channel.title: DTO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Panama cancels China-linked port deal, hands canal terminals to Maersk, MSC
item.description: The simmering dispute has become a geopolitical flashpoint between Washington and Beijing, with Panama caught in the crossfire.

item.title: Senators tell CFTC to make clear ban on prediction market contracts involving deaths
item.description: A letter to Commodity Futures Trading Commission Chairman Michael Selig cites three Polymarket contracts related to a NASA launch, Venezuela and Ukrai...

item.title: Epstein files: DOJ may have withheld FBI interviews with Trump accuser, Rep. Garcia says
Economic calendar: Home-price and consumer-confidence data incoming
Savannah Guthrie offers $1 million reward for missing mother Nancy Guthrie
item.description: Nancy Guthrie, whose daughter Savannah Guthrie is a co-anchor of the "Today" show on NBC, was last seen entering her Arizona home on Jan. 31.

item.title: FedEx sues for refund of Trump tariffs, days after Supreme Court ruling
item.description: The Trump administration has warned that it could take years for refunds to be paid out for tariffs that the Supreme Court ruled are illegal.

item.title: Claude developer Anthropic’s much-anticipated AI event under way — live updates
Struggling with income-tax questions? Sign up now for Don’t Short Yourself Live.
Consumers are less pessimistic about the U.S. economy than previously thought
FedEx lawsuit vs. Trump administration kicks off war over tariff refunds
